_comment: Pre-encoded latent dataset for SA Open Small finetune. 25% track-level subset, 5% (of subset) track-level val holdout. All metadata for global conditioners comes from the per-crop .json sidecars; no extra extraction needed.

_notes.subset_and_holdout: Track-level split is enforced by scripts/goa_metadata.py via deterministic hashing of the parent-dir track name. Each crop's metadata picks up either include/exclude/val from the same hash so train and val sets are exact complements.
conditioners_extracted_from_json: prompt          (synthesised from track_metadata + genre + key + bpm)
_notes.track_id_extraction: parent-dir name of the .npy/.json files (e.g. '100th Monkey - Spiritus')
_notes.to_use_a_different_split: edit GOA_SUBSET_FRAC / GOA_VAL_OF_SUBSET / GOA_SPLIT_SEED at the top of scripts/goa_metadata.py
